name: Prime Smash Burger
description: Double smash patty, cheddar cheese, caramelized onions, prime sauce, brioche bun.

name: Crispy Chicken Burger
description: Crispy fried chicken thigh, coleslaw, pickles, spicy mayo.

name: BBQ Chicken Pizza
description: Smoky BBQ base, grilled chicken, red onions, mozzarella, fresh cilantro.

name: Loaded Beef Pizza
description: Spiced beef mince, bell peppers, olives, double mozzarella, tomato base.

name: Zinger Wrap
description: Crispy zinger fillet, lettuce, cheese slice, garlic sauce, flour tortilla.

name: Beef Seekh Wrap
description: Juicy seekh kebab, raita, onion rings, green chutney, paratha wrap.

name: Loaded Fries
description: Crispy fries topped with cheese sauce, jalapeños, and crispy chicken bits.

name: Mozzarella Sticks
description: Golden fried mozzarella sticks served with marinara dipping sauce.

name: Oreo Shake
description: Thick Oreo milkshake with whipped cream and crushed Oreo topping.

name: Fresh Lemonade
description: Fresh squeezed lemon, mint, chilled sparkling water, a pinch of salt.
